Currently, I can tell you all about the town, its temple, the bank, shops, spell trainers and the depot, as well as about the world status.

Our local bank clerk is called Ebenizer. You can find him north of the depot, near the food shop.
You can buy weapons, armor, tools, gems, magical equipment, furniture, spells and food here.
I'm your guide to the beautiful town Edron. I can mark important locations on your map and give you some information about the town and the world status.
The town of Edron with its shops and facilities is built inside strong castle walls. Another remarkable building is the magic academy.
I'm Jonathan. Pleased to meet you.
Talk to me if you need directions.
Hello, is this your first visit to Rathleton? I can show you around a little.
Free escort to the depot for newcomers!
Currently, I can tell you all about the town, its temple, the bank, shops, spell trainers and the depot, as well as about the world status.
The temple can be found in one of the uptown districts. Look for stairs up from the lower city, you'll find the temple in the northwest of the upper city.
The First Oramond Bank is an important part of Rathleton, and is situated in the centre of the upper city. I can mark it on your map if you want.
You can buy almost everything here! Visit one of our shops for weapons, armors, magical equipment, spells, gems, tools, furnitureand everything else you can imagine.
The depot is a place where you can safely store your belongings. You are also protected against attacks there. I escort newcomers there.
I will help you find your way in the marvellous city of Rathleton. I can mark important locations on your map and give you someinformation about the town and the world status.
This city is a modern marvel of progress. The city's wealth and industry is based on the famous glooth. The magistrate runs the city according to the wishes of its inhabitants.
I'm Kunibert, of course.
Free escort to the depot for newcomers!
Hello, is this your first visit to Thais? I can show you around a little.
Need some help finding your way through Thais? Let me assist you.
Talk to me if you need directions.
I can tell you all about the {town}, its {temple}, the {bank}, {shops}, {spell trainers} and the {depot}, as well as about the {world status}.
The temple is in the centre of Thais. Walk east from the harbour and pass by the {depot} until you reach the infamous crossroads, then turn south.
We have two bankers, Suzy and Naji. Naji is right in the depot. For Suzi, exit the {depot} to the west and walk south-west. Don't forget that I can {mark} important locations on your map.
You can buy {weapons}, {armor}, {tools}, {gems}, {magical} equipment, {furniture} and {food} here.
The depot is a place where you can safely store your belongings. You are also protected against attacks there. I {escort} newcomers there.
I'm a guide, overworked and underpaid. I can mark important locations on your map and give you some information about the town and the world status.
Thais is the oldest settlement in Tibia. You can hear its history whisper when walking through the streets. Beware of criminals, but else it's a fine city.
I'm Luke. No jokes, please, I heard them all!
Need some help finding your way through Ankrahmun? Let me assist you.
Free escort to the depot for newcomers!
Need to know something about the status of this world? Let me answer your questions.
Hello, is this your first visit to Ankrahmun? I can show you around a little.
Talk to me if you need directions.
Currently, I can tell you all about the town, its temple, the bank, shops, spell trainers and the depot.
The temple is in the south-eastern part of town. If you exit the depot to the south and walk east - slightly south-east - you can't miss it.
Tesha is in charge of both the bank and the gem store. You can find her on the market pyramid. Just exit the depot on the north side and walk up the next pyramid.
You can buy weapons, armor, tools, gems, magical equipment, furniture, spells and food here.
The depot is a place where you can safely store your belongings. You are also protected against attacks there. I escort newcomers there.
I will help you to find your way around Ankrahmun. I can mark important locations on your map and give you some information about the town.
Ankrahmun consists almost completely of pyramids. You can walk up and down those pyramids just like you'd climb up stairs. Most shops are on the upper floors.
My name is Rahlkora. I'm a guide.
Hello, is this your first visit to Ab'Dendriel? I can show you around a little.
Talk to me if you need directions.
Free escort to the depot for newcomers!
If you want to know something about the status of this world, talk to me.
Currently, I can tell you all about the town, its temple, the bank, shops, spell trainers and the depot, as well as about the world status.
The temple is built around the elves' holy tree. You can find it north of this harbour.
Finarfin is in charge of the bank. You can find him on the lowest floor of the depot.
You can buy weapons, armor, tools, gems, magical equipment, instruments, furniture, spells and food here.
The depot is a place where you can safely store your belongings. You are also protected against attacks there. I escort newcomers there.
The elves have constructed Ab'Dendriel mainly in and on trees. There is also a large underground cave system with shops, a prison and troll caves.
Free escort to the depot for newcomers!
Hello, is this your first visit to Port Hope? I can show you around a little.
Talk to me if you need directions.
Ask me if you want to know something about the world status!
Need some help finding your way through Port Hope? Let me assist you.
Currently, I can tell you all about the town, its temple, the bank, shops, spell trainers and the depot, as well as about the world status.
The temple is in the north-eastern part of town, left of the depot. The priest there has a little alcohol problem, though. It's sad.
Our bank can be found one floor above the depot. Just talk to Ferks.
The shops here are very close to one another. I can mark them for you if you'd like.
The depot is a place where you can safely store your belongings. You are also protected against attacks there. I escort newcomers there.
I'll help you not to get lost in Port Hope. I can mark important locations on your map and give you some information about the town and the world status.
The inhabitants of Port Hope are bravely facing the constant threat from the jungle. The town is built on pile dwellings and most shops are close to each other.
I'm Tiko and your guide today. Have a good day!
Utevo vis lux!
Passages to Kazordoon! Gotta try the beer there.
Where do you want me to take you? To {Kazordoon}, {Farmine} or {Gnomprona}?
I sell the finest weapons in town. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Me great {wizard}. Me great doctor of {ape people}. Me know many plants. Me old and me have seen many things.
We see many things and learning quick. Merlkin magic learn quick, quick. We just watch and learn. Sometimes we try and learn.
Things not good now. Need helper to do {mission} for me people.
We be {kongra}, {sibang} and {merlkin}. Strange hairless ape people live in city called Port Hope.
Kongra verry strong. Kongra verry angry verry fast. Take care when kongra comes. Better climb on highest tree.
Sibang verry fast and funny. Sibang good gather food. Sibang know {jungle} well.
Merlkin we are. Merlkin verry wise, merlkin learn many things quick. Teach other apes things a lot. Making {heal} and making {magic}.
We see many things and learning quick. Merlkin magic learn quick, quick. We just watch and learn. Sometimes we try and learn.
Jungle is dangerous. Jungle also provides us food. Take care when in jungle and safe you be.
What do you want to know? Something about the three different {difficulties}, the {general} rules or the {prices}? Maybe you also want to know what happens when you {die}?
There are three difficulties: Greenhorn, Scrapper and Warlord. On each challenge you will be confronted with ten monsters increasing in strength.
There are three difficulties: Greenhorn, Scrapper and Warlord. On each challenge you will be confronted with ten monsters increasing in strength.
There are three difficulties: Greenhorn, Scrapper and Warlord. On each challenge you will be confronted with ten monsters increasing in strength.
That is the easiest way in our arena. The {fee} is 1000 gold. We were setting this up for of our children to challenge some easy monsters and train them for the future.
The most common difficulty for us. The {fee} is 5000 gold. So if you are experienced in fighting middle class monsters this is your challenge!
Only the strongest among us will take this challenge. The {fee} is 10000 gold. If you pass that I promise you the respect of all citizens here. You will be a hero!
The fee is either 1000, 5000 or 10000 gold for one try. Remember that if you {die}, it is YOUR problem and you won't be able to get back to your corpse and your backpack.

It would be better not to die! In every pit there is an emergency exit, the portal to the south. If you die in a pit... well... your corpse and backpack are gone, so you enter the arena at your own risk.
Basically you pay me a {fee}, and you are sent into an arena with 10 different stages. If you succeed you will be rewarded accordingly.
My job is to explain about the rules and to get the fee from the competitors.
Well I would rather call it an {Ultimate Challenge} than a mission.
That's the spirit!
Potions! Wands! Runes! Get them here!
You levelled up but your wand is old? Come and buy a new one here!
Ran out of mana or a little kablooie? Come to me to resupply!
Low on magic and need a little extra? Get yourself a rune!
Pack of monsters give you trouble? Throw an area rune at them!
Health potions to refill your health in combat!
Taking back empty potion flasks! Get your deposit back here!
Careful with that! That's a highly reactive potion you have there!
Mana potions to refill your magic power!
Hamish MacGuffin, at your disposal.

I craft highly efficient runes, wands and potions - always handy when you're in a fight against monsters! \z
		Ask me for a trade to browse through my stock.
Nope. Doesn't sound familiar.

Never asked about his past. Seems it's a pretty gloomy one. \z
		But he's an excellent blacksmith and seems content enough with his work here.

Inigo taught me a trick or two since I joined Mr Morris' little crowd. \z
		Quite a nice old chap who's seen much of the world and knows his way around here. \z
		You should definitely ask him if you need help.

Can be quite feisty if you doubt his seniorship. \z
		<snorts> Knows a thing or two about spells, though. Useful knowledge.

Keeran? He's a bit like Plunderpurse's shadow, isn't he? \z
		Loves numbers, but I believe underneath it all he always wanted to break out of his boring little job in the city.

Seems good-natured enough a guy. Nimble with his hands, be it cooking or carpentering. \z
		Seems to want to keep his mind off something, so he's always busy fixing stuff or cooking something up.

If it wasn't for Mr Morris, maybe none of us would be alive. Or at least, none of us would be here. \z
		He's been everywhere and gathered some adventurers around him to investigate the secrets of Dawnport.

Our druid, down in the temple. Just appeared out of the blue one day. Keeps to herself. \z
		She must have some reason to stay with us rather than roam the bigger Mainland. Well, we all have our reasons.

Now there's someone who has lived life to the full! Don't know though \z
		whether I should really believe that he's a clerk now.
Gems and jewellery! Best prices in town!
I am a jeweler. Maybe you want to have a look at my wonderful offers.
I am Hanna.
Buying and selling all sorts of weapons and armors!
I am buying some weapons and armors.
So you are saying you're looking for someone to take you to Vengoth?
Oh well.
I could do that, it's not far from here. I don't run a charity organisation, though. Tell you what. Give me 100 gold pieces, and me and my boat are yours for the trip. Okay?
Okay. Enjoy.
Oh well.
Want me to bring you to Vengoth again for 100 gold?
Okay. Enjoy.
Oh well.
I have a {job}, you know?
Well, I'm kind of a delivery man I guess. I take on small {transportation} jobs with my boat.
Do you seek a passage to Yalahar for |TRAVELCOST|?
Oh well.
MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the king greet with his title!
MIND YOUR MANNERS COMMONER! To address the king greet with his title!
HAIL TO THE KING!
HAIL TO THE KING!
There's a storm brewing.
Ye' want a passage to the blasted isle, right? {Yes} or {no}?
All Hand Hoy!
We would like to serve you some time.
There's a storm brewing.
Ye' want a passage back to cormaya? {Yes} or {no}.
All Hand Hoy!
We would like to serve you some time.
It's a shame that only a few paladins still use their abilities to further the cause of the gods of good. Too many paladins have become selfish and greedy.
Nowadays, most knights seem to have forgotten the noble cause to which all knights were bound in the past. Only a few have remained pious, serve the gods and follow their teachings.
Those who wield great power have to resist great temptations. We have the burden to eliminate all those who give in to the temptations.
The druids here still follow the old rules. Sadly, the druids of Carlin have left the right path in the last years.
The dwarfs are allied with Thais but follow their own obscure religion. Although dwarfs keep mostly to themselves, we have to observe this alliance closely.
The dwarfs are allied with Thais but follow their own obscure religion. Although dwarfs keep mostly to themselves, we have to observe this alliance closely.
Those elves are hardly any more civilised than orcs. They can become a threat to mankind at any time.
Those elves are hardly any more civilised than orcs. They can become a threat to mankind at any time.

Venore is somewhat difficult to handle. The merchants have a close eye on our activities in their city and our authority is limited there. However, we will use all of our influence to prevent a second Carlin.
Drefia used to be a city of sin and heresy, just like Carlin nowadays. One day, the gods decided to destroy this town and to erase all evil there.
Darashia is a godless town full of mislead fools. One day, it will surely share the fate of its sister town Drefia.
Demons exist in many different shapes and levels of power. In general, they are servants of the dark gods and command great powers of destruction.
Carlin is a city of sin and heresy. After the reunion of Carlin with the kingdom, the inquisition will have much work to purify the city and its inhabitants.
We can see his evil influence almost everywhere. Keep your eyes open or the dark one will lead you on the wrong way and destroy you.
The church of Crunor works closely together with the druid guild. This makes a cooperation sometimes difficult.
We owe to the gods of good our creation and continuing existence. If it weren't for them, we would surely fall prey to the minions of the vile and dark gods.
The churches of the gods united to fight heresy and dark magic. They are the shield of the true believers, while the inquisition is the sword that fights all enemies of virtuousness.
The churches of the gods entrusted me with the enormous and responsible task to lead the inquisition. I leave the field work to inquisitors who I recruit from fitting people that cross my way.
Belive on the gods and they will show you the path.
By edict of the churches I'm the Lord Inquisitor.
I'm Henricus, the Lord Inquisitor.
Oh, this misery...
Would you like to receive that protection for a sacrifice of |BLESSCOST| gold, child?
So receive the embrace of Tibia, pilgrim.
Fine. You are free to decline my offer.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
I'm just a simple {huntsman}.
Sorry, I don't think telling a stranger your name is a smart thing to do.
Thank you so much! I'm just too old to walk into the village each day, and the herbs must be fresh. Say, would you like to have a sample of my potions as reward?
Well, then I must have mistaken you with someone else. Or did you lose it on the way?
That's too bad... but I'm sure Lily could give you another one. Just walk back and talk to her again.
Alright then. Good luck on your travels.
Oh, but I insist! After all you made the long way. Please, take my reward!
Well, make some space and then talk to me again. I give you something really useful.
Time doesn't matter to me.
I'm Hyacinth.
I'm a {druid} and healer, a follower of {Crunor}.
May Crunor bless you and protect you on your journeys!
There are only two other druids on Rookgaard, {Lily} and {Cipfried}.
Storage for worldly wealth.
Who knows what it will be? Only time will show.
Thank the gods, I'm fine.
What help do you seek? I sell health potions, ask me for a {trade} if you need one.
I can't teach you magic. On the {mainland} you will learn spells early enough.
I'm one of the few magic users on this isle. I can sense a follower of the dark path of magic hiding somewhere in the depths of the dungeons.
It is shaped by the will of the gods, so we don't have to question it.
I used to be there with my old friend Cipfried to heal adventurers. After all these years, I prefer solitude now.
Teaching you about the gods would require too much time. But you can always read the books in the {library}.
The library is in the {academy}, north of the {temple}.
A place to learn about {Tibia}.
Are you hungry? I'm sorry, I have no food here.
Yes, I sell small health potions. Ask me for a trade if you need one.
I don't care about kings, queens, and the like.
I rarely visit the town. It's much better here.
There's a huge world waiting for you.
Most of the so-called monsters of this isle are only creatures of the gods. There are some beasts that are truly monstrous on the {mainland}.
Are you hungry? I'm sorry, I have no food here.
The dungeons are dangerous for inexperienced adventurers.
Just ask me for a {trade} to check out my offers. I have only small health potions for sale, though.
You'll have to buy that from the merchants in town. I'm just a simple druid and healer.
I'll pay you 5 gold for every empty vial and potion flask. Just ask me for a {trade}.
A greedy and annoying person just like most people are.
Now she has completely gotten out of her mind.
He was a promising young druid when something happened to his mind. It's a sad story.
He does a good job out there.
I know her since she was little.
One of these greedy merchants.
I saw her stranding with her raft.
He's a farmer and behaves a little better than his cousin.
An unpleasant person.
His healing powers equal mine.
I think she's under bad influence.
That's my name.
She's actually quite nice.
She's a druid. Since she started selling health potions, people visit me only rarely. Which is a good thing, but of course I'll help if I'm needed.
The oracle will lead you to your {destiny} once you are level 8.
I think that guy is new. He's a {bank} clerk.
He has some inner devils that torture him.
Tom is the local tanner. That means he always needs fresh corpses or leather.
A man of the sword.
I offer quite a lot of food. Ask me for a {trade} if you're hungry
Hello adventurer, looking for Imbuement items? Just ask me!

Maybe another time.
I can bring you either to the {east} end of Port Hope or to the {centre} of the town, where would you like to go?
I know the ways and lays of Dawnport. Talk to me if you want to know more!
Troll hair, wolf fur, lumps of dirt - bring them to me!
Come to me if you need help!
Hey there, young adventurer! Need a hint?
You came through the portal? Talk to me!
You're going out? Make sure you have a rope with you!
Buying all sorts of creature products!
You're looking thoughtful. Maybe I can help you?

Ah, back in the old days, I was called Inigo Verasquiriz, but I doubt my family would acknowledge me. \z
		Those that are still alive, that is.

I used to be a hunter and trapper, but these bones have grown weary. \z
		I now tan furs and hides and {trade} in creature products. And I can help you find your way if you need directions.

That's where we are - the world of Tibia. \z
		We're on a small island called {Dawnport}, not far from the coast of the Tibian {Mainland}, to be precise.

Oh, I can handle my tasks myself, thank you. \z
		If you are looking for something to do, you should go to Morris and ask him for quests. \z
		You can also help us fight {monsters}.

Well, the other fellows you see here, selling stuff and so forth. \z
		Say a name and I'll tell you what I know of him or her.

Marvellous specimen we have here on {Dawnport}! \z
		Just be careful when you go hunting them, {dying} hurts in {Tibia}! \z
		I will happily buy any creature products you may find.

Used to be a professor at the magic academy in Edron, I believe. \z
		Likes to see different places, so he joined our illustrous little group. \z
		Sells {sorcerer} and {druid} {spells} to our trainees.

I'm not sure that's his actual name, but I guess he has good reasons to stay incognito here. \z
		In any case, he's a formidable fighter and knows usefull {spells} for knights and paladins.

Richard came here as a shipwrecked carpenter, and now sells {tools} and {food} to all adventurers. \z
		If you need a {rope} or {shovel}, {fishing rod} or some provisions for a hunt, you should trade with him!

Knights are close combat fighters, the toughest vocation of all. \z
		They usually wield melee weapons such as swords, axes or clubs.

Druids are nature magicians. \z
		Their speciality is casting ice and earth magic, as well as providing healing for others.

Paladins are well-trained distance fighters and can cast holy magic. \z
		You will usually see them wearing bows or crossbows.
Sorcerers are elemental magicians. They have mastered fire, energy and death magic.

In {Tibia}, you can use different tools with your environment, or for quests. \z
		The most important tools are {rope} and {shovel}. \z
		A {fishing rod}'s also good when you need to eat, and are near a river or the sea.

Food is very important for your health and mana. \z
		If you are hurt in a fight with a monster, select 'USE' on food such as cheese, ham or meat to eat it. \z
		This will slowly refill your health and mana. Here at the outpost, you can buy food from {Richard}.

Use a fishing rod on a patch of water to see if you can catch fish! \z
		Eating is essential in {Tibia} - if you don't eat when you're hungry, you won't regenerate health or mana. \z
		So you should aways have some {food} with you.
Alright, I guess you need a stake first. Maybe Gamon can help you, the leg of a chair or something could just do. Try asking him for a stake, and if you have one, bring it back to me.
I guess you couldn't convince Gamon to give you a stake, eh?
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
So receive my prayer: 'Light shall be near - and darkness afar'. Now, bring your stake to Tibra in the Carlin church for the next line of the prayer. I will inform her what to do.
I will wait for you.
You should visit Tibra in the Carlin church now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
So receive the protection of the twist of fate, pilgrim.
Fine. You are free to decline my offer.
Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Here you are. Take care.
No problem.

Sorry, you don't have enough money.

Our people are very proud and honest. I guess that's more than most people can say about themselves and their people, right boys?
I heard something about a ship crashing in the shelf ice between Nibelor and Grimlund. If I were you, I wouldn't go to chakoya terrain. It's pretty dangerous.
Nasty little beasts. Me and the boys had quite some bloody encounters with them on the ice.
The boys warn me in advance if a monster is around.
My boys did not like the guys that were travelling through our city, and I trust in their instincts. Isn't it so, boys?

They are sometimes trying to catch me and the boys. Such fools, they will never get us. Right, boys?

Me and the boys care only about our own territory.

I guess there are guys like me that have a talent to talk to dogs and there are guys like the shamans that have the talent to talk to spirits.
We don't need any kings or queens. Am I right, boys? Yeah, I am.
Sven the Younger is our current Jarl. For my standards he's still a puppy, but a smart one at least.
Yeah, where could it be. That's the question.
Easy, boys! Don't mention that name again. Makes the boys nuts, ye know?
In my whole long life, I've not seen any sign of those gods the people of the south are constantly talking about.
The icy father. We know him all too well, am I right boys? He has claimed so many old friends in all those years. So many.

I need your help in a matter of utmost {urgency}.
The situation is complicated and it's even hard to say where to {start} best, just to describe it to you.
You see, several incidents in history can be traced back to a single {source}.
Things get murkier the further you go down in history, but that's not even necessary. Even today we can discern a certain pattern in recent {events}.
The recent rise of lycanthropy, the robbery of certain forbidden arcane texts and the vanishing of at least three dangerous individuals, targeted by the inquisition are just the tip of the {iceberg}.
This outside force is moving behind the scenes since ages. Our research suggests that this force probably even {predates} the rise of humanity.

Well, we are sure that the puppeteer behind all these events is an organisation. So old that even its name, the Shiron'Fal, has lost its meaning, because the {language} it originates from is long dead.
Here is where you come into play. We could identify the most recent plot of the Shiron'Fal and already had some {clashes}.
In our efforts to hinder their plot, we achieved mixed results at best. But now things are escalating fast and we have to {hurry}.
Our resources are already stretched thin, so we need your help with the most recent {problem}.
The legion tries to use a new form of twisted rituals to raise the bodies of well-known {knights}.
These powerful undead were a terrible threat on their own but it seems even they are just part of some larger {scheme} that we cannot make out yet.
We are still working feverishly to uncover their goals but for now more imminent {threats} are at hand.
Death cultists of the Shiron'Fal are trying to locate the bodies of fallen knights and raise them in blasphemous {rituals}.
The churches of the gods worked hand in hand to supply us with the means to {purge} the graves of those knights.
Don't enter this area if you are an inexperienced fighter! It would be your end!
Don't forget to deposit your money here in the Global Bank before you head out for adventure.
My house! Uahahahaha <sniffs>.
Dear gods! My precious house, DESTROYED!!
Oh no!! What am I supposed to do now?!?
The only animal to catch there is the cobra and most people don't like to keep one as a pet.
Who wants such an animal as a pet?!?!
Those amazons denied making business with me. You know the reason?!? I tell you, the reason was that I am MALE! Ridiculous!
For sure, I would have offered cats!
He gave me the permission to open up a pet shop here. I paid him almost everything I got!
I made contact with Svargrond! A guy named Buddel wanted to sell me a three-headed dog. I haven't seen it yet, but imagine how much money I could make by breeding such a pet!!
I like it here, at least the town. I was warned that there are nasty creatures outside the town walls but I didn't expect anything to happen so close to town!
I was always good with animals. My parents had a farm, the McRonalds farm. Maybe you know it. Anyway, I had the idea that people may like to have animals as companions and so one led to another.
I'd go mad listening to this 'ribbit' the whole time. But each to his own!
I'm new here in Edron. I wanted to open up a pet shop. But now I'm ruined, uahahahaha <sniffs>.
I need to write a letter to the king. I'm not sure if those 2 million gold coins that Daniel Steelsoul demanded from me weren't too much.
I'm there from time to time, catching frogs. People like their bright colours.
My name is Jerom but no need to remember my name. All my belongings are destroyed and stolen. I'll be gone soon!
Raymond Striker offered me a contract to export parrots from Meriana but I won't need them anymore now that I'm ruined.
Not a very good spot to catch animals. At least no animals that pass off as pets.
Yesterday I would have said that I like all creatures of Tibia but TODAY my life has changed! When I catch this stinking troll!!
True, why not keep a rat as a pet! They can eat your trash, live inside your walls and you don't have to worry if one dies ! Could be a huge success....if I weren't ruined!!!!
That would be a mission for a hero.
Well, I don't see any other way than going back to my home country now.
Good idea! Easy to catch and once the owner has been bitten, he can't sue me anymore, hehehe!!.... but wait....I forgot....I'm ruined, uahahahaha <sniffs>.
I never make profit in Thais and most of the time I get robbed. I stopped visiting Thais for business some years ago.
I don't have anything to earn a living with, everything is destroyed! Otherwise I could offer you pets.
I saw a troll rummaging in the remains of my house last night! I'm sure this creature is behind that! But I am too weak to take revenge.
I've been to town and on my way back I heard a deafening sound. Then I saw that the sound came from a huge rock smashing my house.

You should really take some time and travel around the marvellous areas of Tibia. There's everything - ice islands, deserts, jungles and mountains!
The temple is the place to go when you are very low on {health} or poisoned. Ask {Cipfried} for a heal - he usually notices emergencies by himself.
Health potions will heal you for about 75 hit points. It can't hurt to carry one with you, just in case.

The king supports our little village very much!
In the academy you can get a lot of information from books. You can also try out a few things by yourself.
Isn't it lovely here? You'll be surprised once you reach the {mainland} -  so much to explore!
Well, the mainland also consists of several continents. You can go there once you've reached level 8 and talked to the {oracle}.
Good monsters to start with are rats. They live in the {sewers} under the village of {Rookgaard}.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see what I buy from you.
Be careful down there! Make sure you bought enough {torches} and a {rope} or you might get lost.
There are many sewer entrances throughout Rookgaard. If you want to know more details about monsters and dungeons, best talk to one of the guards.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see my offers. Apart from that, I also sell {footballs}.
I really love flowers. My favourites are {honey flowers}. Sadly, they are very rare on this isle. If you can find one for me, I'll give you a little reward.
You could check out which armors or shields I offer by asking me for a {trade}. Don't be shy!
Yes, I'm selling that. Simply ask me for a {trade} to view all my offers.
Well, no gold, no deal. Earn gold by fighting {monsters} and picking up the things they carry. Sell it to {merchants} to make profit!
He sells {weapons}. However, I can offer you better deals than him!
I'm glad she stopped selling stuff. There was too much of a competition going on!
Sometimes, I see him walking outside the village near some hole.
He dedicated his life to welcome newcomers to this island.
Poor old woman, her son {Tom} never visits her.
Al Dee has a general {equipment} store in the north-western part of the village.
She lives under the {academy}. Always nice to chat with her!
He's a local farmer. If you need fresh {food} to regain health, it's a good place to go. He's only trading with premium adventurers, though.
He's a local farmer. If you need fresh {food} to regain your health, it's a good place to go. However, many monsters carry also food such as meat. Or you could simply pick {blueberries}.
Visiting Cipfried in the {temple} is a good idea if you are injured or poisoned. He can heal you.
She's {Obi's} granddaughter and deals with {armors} and {shields}, just as I do.
He mostly stays by himself. He's a hermit outside of town - good luck finding him.
She buys all {blueberries} and {cookies} you can find.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above {Seymour}. Go there when you are level 8 to reach more areas of {Tibia}.
He is the {bank} clerk, just below the academy.
Seymour is a teacher running the {academy}. He has a lot of important {information} about Tibia.
He's the local tanner. You could try selling fresh corpses or leather to him.
He is a great warrior and our protector.
Do you want to buy a football for 111 gold?
Here you go.
You don't have enough money.
Oh, but it's fun to play!
Oh, thank you so much! Please take this piece of armor as reward.
Honey flowers are my favourites <sighs>.
Teaching paladin spells! Just come to me!
We are always looking for sniper gloves. They are supposed to raise accuracy. If you find a pair, bring them here. Maybe I can offer you a nice trade.
Welcome to the post office!
Hey, send a letter to your friend now and then. Keep in touch, you know.
If you need help with letters or parcels, just ask me. I can explain everything.
No, no, no, there IS no parcel bug, I'm telling you!
Are you injured or poisoned? Get your potions here! All natural, no artificial ingredients!
Hey you, over there! Let's have a little chat, shall we?
Oh, just in case you are looking for the marketplace and dungeons, just follow the path to the east.
Anyone got some cookies for me?
Do you need help? Just ask me about anything you'd like to know!
I'm buying all of your blueberries for my famous blueberry juice!
Oh. In that case, maybe you're interested in a {trade} - I sell potions and buy a few other things.
Oh. Well, if you change your mind, let me know.
No, you haven't. If you're looking for the way to Hyacinth, just leave the village to the north and then go east. I've marked it on your map!
Is something... wrong? You didn't lose the herbs, did you?
Well, at least you're honest. I can give you another sack, but only if you promise not to lose them this time. Okay?
Phew. That's a relief. Well, don't forget to deliver them to Hyacinth! They have to be fresh to create potions.
Oh. Well, if you change your mind, let me know.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see what I buy from you. If you want to sell {blueberries}, ask me about them separately.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see my offers. If you want to sell {blueberries}, ask me about them separately.
How can I help you? If you like to buy something, just ask me for a {trade}. We can also chat about {Tibia}. Or, I could give you general {hints} about the game.
You definitely need a good {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}. Also, you should never leave for a {dungeon} without {rope}, {shovel} and {torch}.
I'm in tune with myself and with nature. Thank you.
I'm a {druid}, bound to the spirit of nature. My {potions} will help you if you feel bad. I also buy {blueberries} and {cookies}. Just ask me for a {trade}.
My name is Lily, like the flower. It also stands for purity, just like my {potions} are!
It's about |TIME|. But does it really matter? Don't rush yourself and enjoy all these little moments.
It's wise to store most of your gold at the bank below the academy. It's safer that way.
If you tell me the name of a citizen, I'll tell you what I know about him or her.
Antidote potions will cure {poisoning}. They also have a lovely {blueberry} taste. You only need them when you get poisoned deep down in a dungeon, else just go to the {temple} for a free heal!
Some creatures like snakes or poison spiders can poison you. That will diminish your health over a certain amount of time, so be careful when dealing with those creatures!
Being a druid is a wonderful profession. You control the forces of nature and can heal others.
There are many shops around here which are owned by local {citizens}.
The temple is just to the right. You can get a healing for free there if you are badly injured or poisoned.
Tibia is our beautiful world, created by the gods. Being a {druid}, I'm a worshipper of {Crunor}.
Crunor is the great lord of trees and the creator of all plants. Despite what some people believe, he didn't create the {monsters}, though.
Oh, I'm sorry honey, I don't sell food. If you are hungry, visit one of the farmers {Billy} and {Willie}. I buy {blueberries} and {cookies}, though.
I can offer you homemade {antidote} potions and small {health} potions. Ask me for a {trade} if you like to see them.
Health potions will heal you for about 75 hit points. It can't hurt to carry one with you, just in case.
I think Tibia would be a better place without authorities who lead others to war. Can't we just all live in peace?
The academy is the big stone building in the town centre. If you're ready to leave Rookgaard, go there to see the {oracle}.
Well, in this village and its surroundings you can {train} your skills until you are level 8. Then you should see the {oracle} and head to the {main} continent.
To train your skills, simply help us {fighting} monsters.
If you want to fight monsters, you should get better {equipment} from the {merchants}. You should also talk to one of the bridge {guards} to find suitable monsters for you.
To view the offers of a merchant, simply talk to him or her and ask for a {trade}. They will gladly show you their offers and also the things they buy from you.
The main continent is huge! The gods of Tibia created everything from great seas, deep jungles and large deserts.
Sadly, our little village of {Rookgaard} is invaded by monsters. From the {dungeons} they creep to the surface and attack the city. We always need adventurers helping us to {fight} them.
If you are looking for weapons, you should visit {Obi}'s shop east of here. Or, if you have a {premium} account, go to {Lee'Delle} for better offers.
Armors? Best buy them at {Dixi}'s little counter, just upstairs from {Obi}'s shop. Or, if you have a {premium} account, go to {Lee'Delle} for better offers.
Shields? Best buy them at {Dixi}'s little counter, just upstairs from {Obi}'s shop. Or, if you have a {premium} account, go to {Lee'Delle} for better offers.
If you need information about the dungeons here, you should talk to one of the bridge {guards}. They will show you where to go.
Our bridge guards are {Dallheim} and {Zerbrus}. You can find Dallheim if you follow the path to the right, then turn north at the {temple}.
Yum, cookies! If you have some for me, just ask me for a trade.
Earn gold by fighting {monsters} and picking up what they carry. Sell it to {merchants} to make profit!
I will pay you 5 gold for every empty vial and potion flask. Just ask me for a {trade}.
You best buy such equipment at {Al Dee}'s store in the North of the village. Or, if you have a {premium} account, go to {Lee'Delle} for better offers.
Oh yes, I love cookies! Will you accept 1 gold for it?
Fine! Here's your gold.
Sorry, you do not have one.
Oh, what a pity.
Oh, do you have blueberries for sale? I need them for my {antidote potion}. I give you 1 gold for 5 of them, yes?
Fine! Here's your gold.
Oh, I'm sorry. I'm not buying less than 5 blueberries.
As you wish.
He sells {weapons}. His shop is east of here.
I don't know what to think about all this new bar. {Rookgaard} needs a little peace!
He used to help me gather blueberries. Then, one day, he suddenly stopped comming here. They say he went a little out of his mind.
We tried everything to fight that cockroach plague in his cellar, but natural anti-bug potions simply won't help. I guess those roaches need to be fought with stronger weapons.
That poor old woman. I wish I could help her.
Best tool shop in town, if you ask me.
I heard that she's recovering below the academy. She has been on an exciting expedition. I haven't talked to her yet, though.
Visiting Cipfried in the {temple} is a good idea if you are injured or poisoned. He can heal you.
She's {Obi}'s granddaughter and deals with {armors} and {shields}, just upstairs from Obi's shop.
Hyacinth also sells small health potions. He lives outside the village, in a hidden place.
If you are a {premium} adventurer, you should check out {Lee'Delle's} shop. She lives in the western part of town, just across the bridge.
You can find the oracle on the top floor of the {academy}, just above {Seymour}. Go there when you are level 8 to reach more areas of {Tibia}.
He takes care of the {bank}, keeping our money safe.
Seymour is a teacher running the {academy}. He has many important {information} about Tibia.
He's the local tanner. You could try selling fresh corpses or leather to him.
He is a great warrior. He can also tell you much about {monsters} and {dungeons} on this island.
He's a farmer and sells {food}. Food will help you regain health when you are injured. Many {monsters} also carry food with them.
Hold your tongue.
Greetings, |PLAYERNAME|.
Goodbye, |PLAYERNAME|.
Don't forget to deposit your money here in the Tibian Bank before you head out for adventure.
Do you seek a passage to
Maybe another time.
I heard he is some scary magician or so.
I can travel you to west, centre, darama, chor or banuta.
So receive the protection of the twist of fate, pilgrim.
Fine. You are free to decline my offer.
Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Here you are. Take care.
No problem.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
Here you are. Take care.
Sorry, you don't have enough money.
No problem.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.
You can ask for the blessing of spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of Tibia.
You can ask for the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
The spark of the phoenix is given by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
I enjoy the peace and solitude out here. You're welcome to be my guest as long as you behave in a quiet and tolerable manner.
Some call me {animal} whisperer. Others say I'm just crazy. I refer to myself as a simple {stable} keeper.
Some call me {animal} whisperer. Others say I'm just crazy. I refer to myself as a simple {stable} keeper.
I love all animals, whether small or big. I also believe each one, even the wildest and most ferocious being, can be talked to, understood and {tamed}.
It's my dream to shelter many different tamed animals. Maybe one day that dream will come true.
Well, usually you can tame animals with the help of a few simple items. If you've found such an {item}, show it to me and I might be able to help you with instructions on the taming process.
Well? Which item have you found and require advice for?
That's among the favourite foods of donkeys, as far as I know. It's a shame I haven't really seen any donkey around. It could require a magic trick to actually get to meet one.
Pandas love to eat bamboo leaves, but the Tiquandan pandas are actually not that skilled at climbing, so they have a hard time getting some for themselves. You might be able to tame one with them.
I heard that terror birds really love carrots. I'd try waving it in front of one of those.
Ah, what a pretty ribbon. Reminds me of the elusive dragonlings - they're quite elegant and vain. They would probably welcome a decorative element. They're sometimes spotted during volcano eruptions.
What a neat little elvish gadget. Did you know a diapason works with vibrations to create sound? I actually think this could work on a creature made of crystals.
I'm against violence towards any creature. I've heard those barbarians in the desert use it for disobedient dromedaries.
Oh, what a nice little plant! Did you know it's supposed to bring luck? So is the lady bug. Both of them might actually go well together.
I've heard that there once was a gang of manta ray riders who liked to adorn their mantas with a foxtail. Don't ask me why, maybe they like how it floats in the wind when running really fast?
What a strange device! This looks like a tool for someone who creates golems and modifies living creatures. You could probably tame a modded creature with it, but I doubt they live in the wild.
Oh, that's one of the favourite foods of a crustacea gigantica. I think you can just distract it with the food and quickly jump on its back.
Have you ever encountered a magma crawler? They only eat and drink really hot things. You could probably try and make one drink some glow wine - and quickly mount it as long as it's drunk.
Hm. What an interesting find. This is definitely not used for any sort of animal. Maybe a vehicle? I can imagine it could be used for a bike of some sorts.
That looks like it might fit a draptor. If you can ever get close enough to one to catch it, I'd simply try putting it on while whispering calming words.
The sound of a hunting horn is often intimidating to forest creatures, but I heard that wild boars actually like it.
Ironblights consist mainly of stone and iron. With a strong magnet like that you can basically force it to walk in the direction you're wanting it to.
Try catching a midnight panther using that one. Don't hit the panther, mind you. Just let the whip crack in the air - I think that will work.
As far as I know, leeches can be found in terrestrial, swampy areas. Leeches often help large animals such as water buffaloes to get rid of parasites.
You should show that giant jaw to a creature looking like the one you got it from. It will respect you when it sees those scary teeth.
Where did you get that? What a rare treat. This must have been crafted by someone who truly loves both music and animals. I can't tell you anything else about it.
Oh, a nail case..., I hate paring nails. But I heard gravediggers become trusting when they get the right treatment.
How impressive, a nightmare horn. Have you ever encountered a shock head? Try hypnotizing them with your horn.
You could probably ride a black sheep with these. Talk to it gently and carefully put on the reins.
Wow, that's a rarity. Have you ever met one of those large sandstone scorpions? They're quite impressive. You need such a sceptre to show to one that you're its new master.

That might be the only way to tame a bear. It has a sensitive spot right between the ears which will calm it down, but you're not strong enough for simple acupressure. Using the slingshot is likely to help you with that.
As the name indicates - this can be used to make a slug much faster than it normally is! Once you've tamed it, it will race you wherever you want to go.

Create sugar oat by just mixing a bunch of sugar cane with a bunch of wheat. All horses love sugar oat! Sometimes when the horses from the horse station in Thais are on the loose, wild horses mix with the herd. Maybe they can be tamed?
The interesting part about that bait isn't the sweet stuff - it's the flies attracted to the sweet smell. Spiders love to eat flies, especially the Zaoan ones.
Hm! Now that's an interesting one. Where did you get that from? I could imagine it winds something up in a factory, but it's definitely not a normal animal.
It's on the door.
BEWARE! Beware of that hole!
STAY AWAY FROM THAT HOLE!
What are you doing here?? Get away from that hole!
My name is Loui.
I'm a {monk}. I wanted to do something here, but I forgot what it was when I fell in that {hole}.
I'm a humble servant of the {gods}.
They created Tibia and all lifeforms.
I have no idea how long I've been in this {hole}. It seemed like an eternity!
While looking for something - which I forgot - I found that {hole}. I went down, even though I had no torch. And then I heard {THEM}! There must be dozens!
They were so many, EVERYWHERE! I could barely escape alive. I have no clue what THEY were but one more second down there and I'd have been dead!
Sorry, I'm out of mana and ingredients, please visit Cipfried in town.
The good thing is that those horrible rats stay mostly in town. The bad thing is that they do so because of bigger {monsters} that would devour them outside.
Everything around us, that is Tibia.
Most adventurers take their first steps there.
Pah, king! He should do something about this {hole}!
This is the place where everything starts.
Was it...? Yes, I might have looked for blueberries as I foolishly entered this unholy {hole}.
There must be an army of them, just down this {hole}.
Then, they must be magic wielding beasts using creature illusion! Good thing you escaped.
The gods blessed Tibia with abundant forms of life.
The good thing is that those horrible rats stay mostly in town. The bad thing is that they do so because of bigger {monsters} that would devour them outside.
I have no quests but to stay away from that {hole} and I recommend you to do the same.
I'm penniless and poor as becomes a humble monk like me.
She owns a shop in town.
She owns a bar in town.
Waaaah! Don't shock me like that!
He has his own monsters, I believe.
Harmless old woman.
He owns a shop in town.
Who's that? Never heard about her.
He owns a shop in town.
He's a farmer.
The gods may protect me from his rudeness.
A hermit on the other side of town.
The oracle! Yes! You should get off this island as fast as you can!
Young and inexperienced he is.
Seymour is the headmaster of the local {academy}.
I'm sure he has never seen monsters like those in this hole before.
I tried to warn him about these monsters but he just laughed at me!! It's an outrage!
Stop by and rest a while, tired adventurer! Have a look at my wares!
I am selling equipment for adventurers. If you need anything, let me know.
This is Ruffy my dog, please don't do him any harm.
I sell torches, fishing rods, worms, ropes, water hoses, backpacks, apples, and maps.
I am Lubo, the owner of this shop.
Oh! I'm sorry, I sold the last one just five minutes ago.
My hat? Hanna made this one for me.
Oh, you sure mean this old story about the mage Dago, who lost two fingers when he conjured a dragon.
There are some strange stories about a magicians pet names. Ask Hoggle about it.
Selling herbs, mushrooms and flowers, all picked under the light of the full moon!
I'm selling various herbs, mushrooms, and flowers. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Ok, let's keep it then.
Ok, your marriage proposal to {
Great! Marriages should be an eternal commitment.
Ok, you are now divorced of {
Would you like to get married? Make sure you have a wedding ring and the wedding outfit box with you.
That's fine.
And who would you like to marry?
Is your soulmate and friends here with you for the celebration?
Then go bring them here!
Good, let's {begin} then!

No problem.
I think you have forgotten to bring your stake.
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
So receive my prayer: 'Peace may fill your soul - evil shall be cleansed'. Now, bring your stake to Yberius in the Venore temple for the next line of the prayer. I will inform him what to do.
I will wait for you.
You should visit Yberius in the Venore temple now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
A blessed stake? That is a strange request. Maybe Quentin knows more, he is one of the oldest monks after all.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Welcome, young |PLAYERNAME|! If you are heavily wounded or poisoned, I can {heal} you for free.
May the gods bless you, |PLAYERNAME|!
Not enough purple nightshade ... not enough liquid silver. *sigh*
You think the full moon is a romantic affair? Think again!
This place isn't safe. You should leave this island.
<mumble>
Sorry, I don't have a spare comb. I lost my favourite one when diving around in Calassa.

I can take you to {Fenrock} and {Mistrock}!
I am Maris, Captain of this ship.
Stop mumbling and don't bug me.

My name is Marlene.
I'm Bruno's wife. Besides: Have you already heard the latest news about the seamonster, Aneus, or the rumours in this area?
Bruno is a wonderful husband. But he is seldom at home. *looks a little bit sad*
Ah, old Graubart. A very nice person. But he is strange. He always is busy when I want to talk to him. *lost in thoughts*
My pleasure, I always enjoy sharing interesting stories.
Potions brewed by the leading alchemists of the land!
Do you seek a ride to
You shouldn't miss the experience.
There are many of them to the north and south of this continent. I had thought they only existed on Tiquanda, but I was mistaken.
What a strange and bizarre continent. I'm glad my landing place is far away from all the mess I've seen from above.
I can fly you to {Darashia}, {Edron}, {Issavi}, {Svargrond}, {Kazordoon}, {Femor Hills} or to {Marapur} if you like. Where do you want to go?

Melian at your service.
These mountains don't look friendly. I prefer not staying long inbetween my carpet trips.
Only licensed carpet pilots are allowed to fly those.
There's so much green stuff down there that I'm not sure whether there are any, but yes, might be, might be.
Well, dwarves and their steamboat technology are well and good, but nothing beats flying on a carpet.
Well, dwarves and their steamboat technology are well and good, but nothing beats flying on a carpet.
That's the name of that dwarven base as far as I know. Got a bit of a pessimistic ring to it if you ask me. Sounds to me like they're starving.

The only humans I've seen on this continent are those that come up to my carpet.
What a strange and bizarre continent. I'm glad my landing place is far away from all the mess I've seen from above.
You are probably talking about the {FEMOR hills}.
It's 2:55 pm right now. I think I'm five minutes late in my schedule.
Selling weapons and armors to protect mortal souls.
It's my duty to protect the city.
What a fascinating idea!
The Horn of Plenty is always open for tired adventurers.
I can offer you beer, wine, lemonade and water. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Are you looking for food? I have bread, cheese, ham, and meat. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
I can offer you lemonade, camel milk, and water. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
Are you looking for food? I have bread, cheese, ham, and meat. If you'd like to see my offers, ask me for a {trade}.
The menu of the day sounds delicious!
The last visit to the theatre was quite rewarding.
Such a beautiful and wealthy city - with so many opportunities ...
Come in, young mages! Purchase the latest in runes and wands!
Perhaps I need to bake them hotter? Or was it longer?
Offering all sorts of magic equipment!
Now where did Alaistar put the wood for the new wands?
Hmmm.. Maybe those crushed gems caused the strange side effect?
Wands and rods, the true magician's weapons of choice!
I can forge the finest {weapons} for knights and warriors. They may wear them proudly and visible to everyone.
Would you rather be interested in a {knight's sword} or in a {warrior's sword}?
JAAAAACK? EVERYTHING ALRIGHT DOWN THERE?
Oh dear, I can't find anything in here!
There is still some dust on the drawer over there. What where you thinking, Jane?
<grumble> Maybe I should rearrange some warm currents to get rid of this horrible fog.
All these treasures I cannot reach... what a pity.
I have a quest that needs doing. Interested?
Hmmm. Interesting. If only someone could help investigate this.
There's a task for an intrepid adventurer open! Any volunteers?
Hey, you. Yes, you. I could use your help.

<sigh> The Adventurers' Guild really should have equipped me with more man power. \z
		Who's to keep all those monsters in check?
So much to investigate, so little time...
Buying all sorts of creature products!
You're looking thoughtful. Maybe I can help you?

Hm. Well, you look like you want to take a look at the unknown yourself. \z
			I might have a job for you. Choose what you would like to do - {fetch} some things, or {kill} some monsters.

Hm. Well, you look like you want to take a look at the unknown yourself. \z
			I might have a job for you. Choose what you would like to do - {fetch} some things, or {kill} some monsters.

There's three things that need to be found. You can look for an {amulet}, \z
			a {log book} or pick some rare {herbs}. Take your pick.

Well, those monsters have grown very uppity lately. There's a choice of three - mountain {trolls}, \z
			muglex clan {goblins} or, if you are up to it or together with some friends, \z
			there's a need to weed out some risky {minotaur} bruisers. Choose your target.
Mr Morris will do.

There's always someone who needs to be at the front, to take the first step into the unknown. \z
			My whole life has been full of such steps.

Ah, that old story of how it was named? I spread it around. \z
			Can't remember really what its origins are. Interesting archeological findings here, though.

Ah yes. Well, the magic that led us here seems to be most potent at a certain time, close before sunrise. \z
			Perhaps like a giant pulse, or beacon. Maybe the gods set it here, or a mad sorcerer, \z
			we don't know for sure yet... The portal deep down in the caves, resonating with magical energy where you came \z
			through, can maybe bring something else into this world as well. \z
			So it must be carefully guarded while we investigate the island for more clues... \z
			There are some very interesting archeological findings here on the island throughout. \z
			Seems the island has drawn some cults here, but why they are gone now, no one knows.

It seems that throughout its history, this island was inhabited by very different species. \z
			I like to study their remains.

Yeah. Long time I haven't been to that place. How's old Vascalir? Still hanging around in the academy? \z
			And Kraknaknork? Hah, I remember our brawl after that last card game. Fun times.

What about him? Is he in one of his dark moods again? That's his normal mood, I mean. \z
			Just buy your armor, weaponry and ammunition there and don't worry.
Tired of the academy, maybe, but not of teaching. If you need druid or sorcerer spells, go to him.

Ah, good old Hamish. A real wizard with potions. \z
			Will supply you with very useful magic equipment for hunting.
Exactly. Has a nice ring to it.
She's a good listener if you should still hesitate as to the choice of your definite vocation.

Well, for him it's always been just a question of ''Your gold or your life'' - gold it is nowadays. \z
			You can stash your loose change at ol' Abram, but make sure to withdraw it once you leave Dawnport!

Ran across Inigo a few times on some remote islands, years and years ago. \z
			Talked him into coming along here, and he seems to enjoy helping newcomers find their way. \z
			Passing his knowledge on to the next generation.

We found him here half-dead and fixed him up, now he fixes us dinner and roof beams. \z
			Definitely someone you should check out for food, a rope and a shovel.

Been together through many a desperate situation. A romantic underneath it all. \z
			Found the time to specialise on spells for paladins and knights somewhere along the way.
Be careful that he doesn't bore you to death with accountants of, well, your bank account history.
Ah, the goblin who sneaks around here now and then? Lives in a cave to the west, somewhere.
I am the leader of the true sons of {Daraman}.
I am the leader of the true sons of {Daraman}.
This is our home - the land of the desert.
We will fight that city until we get back what belongs to us.
We avoid these places you call cities.
I would go crazy living in a cage like that.
We have nothing that would be of value for you.
That is the curse for not following the rules of the desert. No son of the desert has ever come back from the dead.
We have nothing that would be of value for you.
Don't forget to deposit your money here in the Global Bank before you head out for adventure.
Don't forget to deposit your money here in the Global Bank before you head out for adventure.
You need to find some heroes. Find, find, find!!
It's a wise idea to store your money in your bank account.
Welcome to the post office!
Also selling runes, potions and magical equipment!
Passages to Senja, Folda and Vega.
Do you want a round-trip passage to
Have a nice trip!
You shouldn't miss the experience.
Where do you want to go today? We serve the routes to {Folda}, {Senja} and {Vega} and back to Tibia.
We are ferrymen. We transport goods and passengers to the Ice Islands.
We are ferrymen. We transport goods and passengers to the Ice Islands.

The lizards here are the chosen ones of their kind. We believe them to be the strongest warriors in these lands.So I lead my people here to learn their ways. We are mere assassins but they are using foreign techniques and seem to be far more efficient

We of the Grey Shadow clan are studying the ways of the Chosen. Our training is hard, encounters with the lizards often deadly. Every one of us fights on his own. Each one more deadly than the other. Under my lead we wil rise renewed, as the Shadow Nina.
I am Nina, leader of the Grey Shadow clan. Me and my followers, the Shadow Nina, are exploring the largely uncharted parts of the continent Zao.
Alright, I guess you need a stake first. Maybe Gamon can help you, the leg of a chair or something could just do. Try asking him for a stake, and if you have one, bring it back to me.
I guess you couldn't convince Gamon to give you a stake, eh?
Yes, I was informed what to do. Are you prepared to receive my line of the prayer?
So receive my prayer: 'Light shall be near - and darkness afar'. Now, bring your stake to Tibra in the Carlin church for the next line of the prayer. I will inform her what to do.
I will wait for you.
You should visit Tibra in the Carlin church now.
You already received my line of the prayer.
So receive the protection of the twist of fate, pilgrim.
Fine. You are free to decline my offer.
Keep your adventurer's stone well.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for free?
Here you are. Take care.
No problem.
Ah, you want to replace your adventurer's stone for 30 gold?
Here you are. Take care.
Sorry, you don't have enough money.
No problem.
You are hurt, my child. I will heal your wounds.
You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the {pilgrimage} of ashes or get the protection of the {twist of fate} here.

Whenever you receive a lethal wound, your vital force is damaged and there is a chance that you lose some of your equipment. With every single of the five {blessings} you have, this damage and chance of loss will be reduced.

There are five blessings available in five sacred places: the {spiritual} shielding, the spark of the {phoenix}, the {embrace} of Tibia, the fire of the {suns} and the wisdom of {solitude}. Additionally, you can receive the {twist of fate} here.
I see you received the spiritual shielding in the whiteflower temple south of Thais.
I can sense that the druids north of Carlin have provided you with the Embrace of Tibia.
I can see you received the blessing of the two suns in the suntower near Ab'Dendriel.
I can sense that the spark of the phoenix already was given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
I can sense you already talked to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya and received this blessing.

I am one with nature, one with the ice and the cold. Names are of no worth out here. Out here, you face isolation and loneliness. Only your strength, willpower and {training} can keep you alive.

My life is one of hardship, hardship I chose freely. Endurance, strength and the power of the will are my only companions in this frigid wilderness. My strength comes from disciplined training and knowledge of the outdoors.

Great drinks and snacks at fair prices!
You know you want a party after all that tiring hunting!
<sings> ... are a girl's best friieeend...
Sing and dance at my bar! Yeah!
Best place in town! Come to my bar!
Well, my name is {Norma}.
I used to be a merchant, but being a barkeeper is so much more fun. It's been my dream since I was a little girl.
It's about |TIME|. Time just flies, doesn't it?
To view the offers of a merchant, simply talk to him or her and ask for a {trade}. They will gladly show you their offers and also the things they buy from you.
I've never been better! I love my new {job}!
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Obi} or {Lee'Delle} if you need a weapon.
As an adventurer, you should always have at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
Ah, the monsters are far away. Let's party now!
If you really want to talk about dungeons, visit Dallheim on the bridge near my bar.
Ewww, I don't even want to think about the smell from the sewers right now!
Oooh, I wouldn't dare gossiping about the king. He might have his spies here somewhere, you know.
This is the world we live in, oh-oh-oh, and these are the hands we're given, oh-oh... oh, I'm sorry, I got carried away!
As a premium adventurer you have many advantages, you should check them out!
I serve the best drinks in town! What's it gonna be, lemonade? Wine? Milk? Beer? Just ask me for a {trade}!
The temple is a good place to visit if you're in urgent need for healing.
Well, the only help I could give you are some general {hints}. And a delicious {drink} along with it.
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle} if you need equipment.
No sorry, I'm out of that business. Please ask {Dixi} or {Lee'Delle} if you need equipment.
Oh, would you like something to eat or drink? Ask me for a {trade} to see my offers!
<gets a dreamy look in her eyes>
Al Dee treats his customers friendly, but he's badmouthing them once he had a few beers.
I'm curious about her adventures. She really should come here more often!
He got lucky when Willie and him played a game of dice about who gets to farm on which side of the river. Ever since, Willie holds a grudge against him.
Hehe, that guy doesn't pretend to be anyone that he isn't. He is what he is - rude, but honest.
Oh shush! It's kinda disgusting when he walks in here with animal blood on his hands!
What Seymour doesn't teach you is how much fun you can have here!
I invited her to my bar, but she refused. Oh well, it was worth a try!
I think that poor guy never gets a break from work. At least he never comes here.
That guy seriously needs some partying and a girlfriend.
The oracle is on the top floor of the academy. You should go there once you are level 8 to leave this island.
I think it's rather strange that he lives here with his granddaughter. No one's ever seen the parents of {Dixi}.
I hate that name, it sounds so boring. Almost like 'normal'. I think I should change my name to something more exciting. Like... Marylin! Oh, what a glamorous sound!
She told me that she dreams of leaving this island to go on a big adventure.
They tell me strange stories about him and some monsters in a hole. Weird!
That girl thinks that she is soooo special and 'high society'. We used to be friends, but well, things change.
That's probably someone I'll never see in my bar.
<giggles> That monk with his holier-than-thou attitude hasn't anything against a good mug of wine now and then.
If you listen to him, you could get the impression my little bar is the devil himself. He says he has more work now keeping drunken adventurers in than monsters out of the city. Such an exaggeration!
Well, as you can see, I sell furniture. Ask me for a {trade} if you're interested to see my wares.
My name is Nydala. I run this store.
It is |TIME|. Do you need a clock for your house?
Only quality steel and wood used for my weapons!
Buy your weapons here!
Selling and buying all sorts of weapons, come and have a look!
Give those monsters a good whipping with my weapons!
Well, how can I help you? Do you need some general {hints}? Or, if you're interested in a {trade}, just ask.
What kind of information do you need? I could tell you about different topics such as {equipment}, {monsters} or {Rookgaard} in general.
{Al Dee} sells torches.
Be careful down there! Make sure you bought enough {torches} and a {rope} or you might get lost.
The king encouraged salesmen to travel here, but only I dared to take the risk, and a risk it was!
It's about |TIME|. Yes, |TIME|. I'm so sorry, I have no watches for sale.
My name is Obi, just Obi, the honest merchant. If you like to {trade}, just ask.
I'm a merchant and the local {weapon} smith. If you like to see my quality wares or sell weapons to me, ask me for a {trade}.
As an adventurer you should always have at least a {backpack}, a {rope}, a {shovel}, a {weapon}, an {armor} and a {shield}.
If I were you, I'd invest my money in quality steel rather than putting it in a so-called safe bank account!
Well, the mainland also consists of several continents. You can go there once you are level 8 and have talked to the {oracle}.
Ah, Rookgaard. Home sweet home, that's what it became for me, but I will always miss {Thais} and {Sam}.
Oh, Thais, I'll be back. One day, I'll be back.
My good old cousin Sam. Oh, how I miss him.
I think good practice is better than reading a boring book. Of course, you will need proper {equipment} to be able to get practice!
told them to let me sell food, but no! Sorry, you have to ask {Willie} or {Billy} on the farms west of here.
Good monsters to start with are rats. They live in the {sewers} under the village of {Rookgaard}.
There are many sewer entrances throughout Rookgaard. One is right outside this shop and to the left. For more details about monsters and dungeons, best talk to one of the {guards}.
The bridge guard {Dallheim} is north of here, just follow the street, you can't miss it.
Sadly, not many merchants are as honest as I am.
I wish I could help you with that, but no, I was told to stick to weapons. Go see {Lily}.
There are many blueberry bushes in and around this village. Nature's for free.
I'm fine. It's a little hot near the crucible, but I enjoy the sound of forging {weapons}.
Just ask me for a {trade} to see which things I buy from you.
Oh, just upstairs. My granddaughter {Dixi} is in charge of selling armors and shields.
Yes, I'm selling weapons. Just ask me for a {trade} to see my offers and the things I buy from you.
Well, no gold, no deal. Earn gold by fighting {monsters} and picking up the things they carry. Sell it to {merchants} to make profit!
I wish I could help you with that, but no, I was told to stick to weapons. Go see {Al Dee} or {Lee'Delle}.
I sell {weapons} of all kinds. Just ask me for a {trade} if you like to see my offers.
I don't know how anyone could give up the flourishing business she led. She should have listened to me and find someone who continues that business for her.
I told him there was no danger, but he wouldn't listen to me, no one listens to me.
I suggested him opening a tourist guide company with me, Obi's and Santiago's, but he didn't approve. I really don't understand why.
An old woman shouldn't be treated like that, no way, that's bad.
Oh, this guy is so greedy, so greedy. Ripping off poor adventurers like you!
She is beautiful, very, very beautiful. I hope I can impress her somehow.
He's just like his cousin {Willie}.
This guy doesn't understand that he should entrust me with the food business, too. He really should do. Then he had time for his farm.
He shouldn't heal people for free, no he shouldn't. That would be a great source of income for the village that could be invested in enhancing the smithy.
Oh, what an endearing little girl, and she's working so hard to help me, even without receiving payment. Such a sweet little girl!
I don't like him, actually I dislike him deeply. He is so greedy that he doesn't want to share his profit he gains from health potions.
She ruins the market with her offers! This is bad for us honest merchants, really bad.
I knew it! I knew she would try to get the monopoly on potions in this village! But no one has listened to me!
The oracle, ah, such a weird being! It will lead you off this island once you are level 8, yes it will, mark my words.
I told everyone he will cause trouble. He talks people into giving him their money and putting it on the {bank}! They rather should leave it here with us honest merchants!
He is the head of the local academy. I encouraged him to sponsor you, but no one listens to Obi, no one listens to me, as usual.
Well, he just buys what no one else wants. Stuff that's long dead. I can live with that, yes, I can live with that.
What a hero, what a hero.
Yes. I listen, master.
I understand.
Not yet, my brothers. Wait.
I guard this humble temple as a monument for the order of the {nightmare knights}.
My name is Oldrak.
These plains are not safe for ordinary travellers. It will take heroes to survive here.
I can't help you, sorry!
The greatest necromant who ever cursed our land with the steps of his feet. He was defeated by the nightmare knights.
This ancient order was created by a circle of wise humans who were called 'The {Dreamers}'. The order became {extinct} a long time ago.
Many perished in their battles against evil, some went mad, not able to stand their nightmares any longer. Others were seduced by the darkness.
They learned the ancient art of {dreamwalking} from some elves they befriended.
While the dreamwalkers of the elves experienenced the brightest dreams of pleasure, the humans strangely had dreams of {dark omen}.
They dreamed of doom, destruction, talked to dead, tormented souls, and gained unwanted insight into the {schemes of darkness}.
They figured out how to interpret their dark dreams and so could foresee the plans of the dark gods and their minions.
Using this knowledge they formed an order to thwart these plans, and because they battled their nightmares as brave as knights, they named their order accordingly.
It is rumoured to open the entrance to the pits of inferno, also called the nightmare pits. Even if I knew about this secret I wouldn't tell you.
Before the battles raged across them, they were called the fair plains.
That's where we are. The world of Tibia.
They created Tibia and all life on it ... and unlife, too.
Beware the foul undead!
Beware the foul undead!
A weapon of myth and legend. It was lost in ancient times ... perhaps lost forever.
Yenny, known as the Gentle, was one of most powerfull magicwielders in ancient times and known throughout the world for her mercy and kindness.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.
I can offer you the holy tible for a small fee.

Great, another supply ship is due. How is a dwarf supposed to work under these conditions?

Found a new way of living and took to it like a fish to water.

He broods over problems he won't share. But maybe you can help him with a little quest or two.
He lives only for his experiments and potions

I can't imagine a better place to live.
Though the city has seen better days, the quality of life is still much better than in most other cities.

Doesn't ring a bell.
He rarely comes here.
A man of the seas.
He used to visit me for a chat, but ever since that new tavern opened I haven't seen him much anymore.
He sometimes delivers fruit and vegetables to this quarter.

I can't imagine a better place to live

You can bring me a mug of tea if you want to.
I think the gods are too busy to care about us mortals, hmm... that makes me feel godlike, too.
I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent {Durin}!
I am honored to be the assistant of the great, the illustrious, the magnificent {Durin}!
I have a job of great responsibility, mostly I keep annoying persons away from my boss.

Hey, I am not a shopkeeper, I am an important man!
It is nearly tea time, so please hurry!

You are not the first one to ask about that. Am I the only one that preferes wine to such disgusting stuff?
What do you expect from ex-soldiers? He is nuts! Hacked on the head far too often.
Isn't he the artist formerly known as the prince?
I never found any rumour concerning him, isn't that odd?

This man lives in the darkness like a rat and is also as handsome as one of them. He surely is up to no good and often consorts with sinister strangers.
